response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional general software engineering expertise with 15+ years of experience and strong TypeScript/infrastructure skills, he lacks the required 8+ years of production AI solution development. His AI work appears limited to the past month at re:cinq (AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling), and critical gaps exist: no Python expertise (a fundamental requirement), no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization. The role requires deep GenAI domain knowledge that this resume does not evidence.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software engineering excellence across multiple technical domains and staff-level roles
Strong TypeScript proficiency and demonstrated cloud infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
Proven leadership and mentoring capability with ability to establish engineering best practices and run technical workshops
concerns: No Python experience listed despite it being a primary required language for AI work; current skills are primarily TypeScript and infrastructure-focused
GenAI experience limited to ~1 month at current role with no evidence of prior 8+ years building production AI solutions, vector databases, or RAG architectures
No demonstrated experience with critical required technologies: vector databases, RAG systems, LLM performance metrics, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
